calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Cheri L. Gorman, Litigation Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Patrick O'Malley Daly.
Default was entered against defendant on July 31, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 31, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Patrick O'Malley Daly as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,775.56.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,140.20.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $335.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $27,250.76.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than October 6, 2009.
